navigation2_humble_3c3db59.tar.gz
=================================

Navigation2 Humble source snapshot used by this handoff bundle.

Upstream repository: https://github.com/ros-navigation/navigation2
Commit: 3c3db59d6969d8ecee8e68468693d006397f4a0c

The upstream .git directory and generated build/install/log directories are not
included. Upstream package license files remain inside the archive.

setup/install_and_build.sh extracts this archive to nav2_ws/src/navigation2 and
uses rosdep plus colcon to install dependencies and build the required packages.
